testcase.name: test_login_restaurant_admin
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_kds_features.py:258: in test_login_restaurant_admin assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: 429 - {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 10 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_qr_menu_loads
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_kds_features.py:266: in test_qr_menu_loads assert response.status_code == 200, f"QR menu failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: QR menu failed: 404 - {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_dashboard_reports_today
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_kds_features.py:299: in test_dashboard_reports_today assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
